title: stelis desautelsii
intro: Stelis desautelsii, also known as the Desautels' Stelis or Stelis desautelsii, is a species of orchid native to Mexico. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Stelis desautelsii include its potential to treat various ailments such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. In traditional medicine, Stelis desautelsii is often prepared as a tea or infused in water to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
